name: Smoked Salmon, Bacon & Cheddar Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice a piece of smoked salmon into 1/8-inch thick, approximately 1-inch long and 1/2-inch wide pieces; about 14 pieces.
2. Cut each piece of bread and the bacon slices in half.
3. Place a piece of smoked salmon at the end of the bread and sprinkle with cheese.
4. Roll the bread and wrap a piece of bacon around it.
5. Secure with a toothpick.
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 400°F for approximately 15 to 20 minutes, or until the bacon is done.
7. Serve warm.
